default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Prophecy.ai's marketing strategy shifts and potential changes to GrowthX's engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

action_items.description: Schedule meeting with Ashley for next Tuesday to discuss marketing priorities and potential GrowthX involvement
